asr_preview.text: T'as reçu mon message ? Ouais j'ai reçu ouais En même temps je suis pas télépathe donc oui si je suis là j'aurais pas pu deviner que tu serais pile poil ici à 11h Je suis contente de te voir En quoi tu joues là ? Je joue pas Mais arrête ton cinéma ça fonctionne pas avec moi je t'ai déjà dit Donc c'est quoi là ? Tu fais quoi ? C'est un chantage au suicide ? C'est ça ? Ici là ?

Et t'as pas trouvé plus cliché ? Elle est mariée à Jean Blanc, c'est pas cliché ? Bon enfin ça c'est mon histoire, ça te regarde pas. Bah pourquoi t'es là alors ? Bah pour te regarder sauter. Tu veux me voir mourir. Vas-y saute. Que j'aille me marier tranquille. Avec ma mort sur la conscience ? J'ai pas de conscience. Ah bah pas de morale. Ah non, zéro. Ok.

recent_observations.text: The user wants to know why the blonde sent the brunette a text based on the provided transcript and images.
At 53.474s-79.495s, the blonde asks, "Did you get my message?"
At 53.474s-79.495s, an unspecified speaker says, "Yeah I got it."
At 53.474s-79.495s, the blonde says, "I'm not a telepath."
At 53.474s-79.495s, the blonde says, "If I'm here I wouldn't have been able to guess you'd be exactly here at 11h."
At 81.352s-110.883s, the blonde says, "And you didn't find it more cliché?"
At 81.352s-110.883s, the blonde says, "She's married to Jean Blanc, isn't that cliché?"
At 81.352s-110.883s, the blonde says, "Finally that's my story, it doesn't concern you."
At 81.352s-110.883s, an unspecified speaker asks, "So why are you here then?"
At 81.352s-110.883s, an unspecified speaker says, "To watch you jump."
At 81.352s-110.883s, an unspecified speaker says, "You want to see me die."
At 81.352s-110.883s, an unspecified speaker says, "Go ahead jump."
At 81.352s-110.883s, an unspecified speaker says, "Let me get married in peace."
At 81.352s-110.883s, an unspecified speaker says, "With my death on my conscience?"
At 81.352s-110.883s, an unspecified speaker says, "I have no conscience."
At 81.352s-110.883s, an unspecified speaker says, "No morals."
At 81.352s-110.883s, an unspecified speaker says, "Zero."
At 115.777s-143.468s, the blonde says, "But damn, but you're a stupid girl!"
At 115.777s-143.468s, the blonde says, "You're stupid!"
At 115.777s-143.468s, the blonde says, "You come here, you're useless!"
At 115.777s-143.468s, the blonde says, "Do I serve for nothing?"
At 115.777s-143.468s, the blonde says, "You've been annoying me for months."
At 115.777s-143.468s, the blonde says, "It's much more classy to try to screw up my couple!"
At 115.777s-143.468s, an unspecified speaker says, "Your couple?"
At 115.777s-143.468s, an unspecified speaker says, "Your couple of what?"
At 115.777s-143.468s, an unspecified speaker says, "Your shit couple?"
At 115.777s-143.468s, an unspecified speaker says, "Your shit couple that you don't even love your guy!"
At 115.777s-143.468s, an unspecified speaker says, "You don't love him, it's me you love!"
At 115.777s-143.468s, an unspecified speaker says, "I don't love you!"
At 115.777s-143.468s, an unspecified speaker says, "I left Pierre anyway."
In the evaluation section, the blonde is described as mentioning, "Let me get married in peace."
The evaluation section states that "Let me get married in peace" implies the blonde is the one getting married, not the brunette.
The evaluation section states that the brunette is the one "married to Jean Blanc."
The evaluation section states that the blonde is the one getting married.
The evaluation section states that the brunette is the one with the couple.
The evaluation section states that the brunette is the one with the "shit couple."
The evaluation section states that the blonde sent the text to lure the brunette to the cliffs.
The evaluation section states that the rebuke happens after the meeting.
The evaluation section states that avoiding being the brunette's maid of honor is not mentioned.

contains_preview: At 53.474s-79.495s, the blonde asks, "Did you get my message?"
At 53.474s-79.495s, an unspecified speaker says, "Yeah I got it."
At 53.474s-79.495s, the blonde says, "I'm not a telepath."
At 53.474s-79.495s, the blonde says, "If I'm here I wouldn't have been able to guess you'd be exactly here at 11h."

claims.text: The transcript directly establishes that the blonde sent a message and that it was used to get the brunette to a specific location at a specific time: "Did you get my message?" plus "If I'm here I wouldn't have been able to guess you'd be exactly here at 11h."

The subsequent exchange places that arranged meeting in a cliff/jumping setting: one speaker asks why the other is there, and the reply is "To watch you jump," with nearby lines about dying and jumping. This supports that the message was meant to bring the brunette there, not merely to scold her by text.

The marriage and relationship lines show the broader conflict is about the blonde's impending marriage and the brunette's romantic entanglement with her, but they do not say the text was sent to break up with the brunette, avoid being maid of honor, or stall the brunette's wedding. In fact, "Let me get married in peace" points to the blonde's own marriage, not the brunette's wedding.

Among the options, the only one that matches the grounded function of the message is that the blonde used it to lure the brunette to the cliffs. The rebukes occur later during the confrontation, but the message itself is tied to arranging the meeting place and time.

audit_gaps: explicit grounding for why the blonde sent the text, beyond that it arranged the meeting
a textually supported link between the message and the cliff destination as the message's purpose
a grounded discriminator showing why option D fits better than option B
